# National Financial Ombud Scheme — establishment and amalgamation
## Operative date: 1 March 2024

## What the site says

Under LAW_SECTIONS Chargebacks, the site notes: *"National Financial Ombud Scheme (NFO) — banking division. 0860 800 900 · nfosa.co.za. (OBSSA amalgamated into NFO on 1 March 2024.)"*

## Operative facts (verified 2026-04-25)

The NFO is a **one-stop, single-entry-point dispute-resolution scheme** for financial-services complaints in South Africa, formed by the amalgamation of four predecessor schemes on **1 March 2024**.

### The four predecessor schemes that amalgamated into NFO

| # | Predecessor | Abbrev | Sector |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Ombudsman for Banking Services | OBS / OBSSA | Banking |
| 2 | Credit Ombud | CO | Consumer credit |
| 3 | Ombudsman for Long-Term Insurance | OLTI | Long-term insurance (life, retirement annuities) |
| 4 | Ombudsman for Short-Term Insurance | OSTI | Short-term insurance (vehicle, home, etc.) |

### What stayed separate

The **FAIS Ombud** (Ombud for Financial Services Providers) was **not** part of the amalgamation and continues to operate independently — it covers complaints about advice and intermediary services rendered by FSPs.

### Recognition

The Ombud Council granted the NFO recognition as an industry ombud scheme on **23 February 2024** under section 194 of the Financial Sector Regulation Act 9 of 2017. Reference number: **OC/001/24**.

### Background

The four schemes opened amalgamation discussions in early 2020. The June 2021 World Bank report on the role of the financial-sector ombud system in South Africa recommended consolidation. Draft rules and MOI for the amalgamated scheme were published in late 2023; operational launch followed on 1 March 2024.

### Site reliance — strengthen on next site update

The current site copy says only "OBSSA amalgamated into NFO on 1 March 2024." This is accurate but understates scope. A more accurate version would be:

> "OBSSA, Credit Ombud, OLTI and OSTI amalgamated into the National Financial Ombud Scheme (NFO) on 1 March 2024. The FAIS Ombud remains separate."

This is a candidate refinement for `LAW_SECTIONS[4].items.nfo` in `src/data/content.ts` on the next site content pass.
